summary: Iteration 44: Tested 3 fixes for Bloom platform - chat auto-scroll bug, message input width on mobile, and Q&A answer email notifications. All tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js: messagesContainerRef correctly attached to '.flex-1.overflow-y-auto.p-4.space-y-3' div (line 262). Scroll useEffect uses [messages.length] dependency with prevMsgCountRef guard - only scrolls when count increases, not on every render.
MessagesPage.js: Input className includes 'flex-1 min-w-0' (line 282). Input width confirmed at 144px on 390px viewport with 4 action buttons (emoji/image/video/send) - appropriate distribution.

news.py: All imports correct - resend (line 3), SENDER_EMAIL/FRONTEND_URL/logger from database (lines 12-13), bloom_email_html from utils (line 24). Email send wrapped in try/except with logger.warning fallback - won't break if Resend fails.

news.py: Resend API key is set in .env (RESEND_API_KEY) - email notifications are enabled. The condition 'if resend.api_key and question_author and question_author.get("email")' correctly guards against missing config.
seed_data_creation: Test questions created via /api/questions during testing (prefixed TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested: (1) chat scroll fix - useEffect with [messages.length] dep + container.scrollTop scroll only fires on message count increase, verified no page scroll on typing or new message send; (2) Input flex-1 min-w-0 class present and taking 144px on 390px viewport with 4 buttons; (3) Q&A answer endpoint POST /api/questions/{id}/answers returns 200, creates answer in response, 404 for missing question, 401 for unauth. Email notification code is in place with proper guard conditions and try/except. All 9 backend + 7 frontend tests passed.

detailed_results.test_1_input_flex1_minw0: PASS - Input className has 'flex-1 min-w-0', width=144px on 390px viewport (appropriate with 4 action buttons)
detailed_results.test_2_no_page_scroll_on_typing: PASS - window.scrollY remained 0 before and after typing 60 chars in input
detailed_results.test_3_no_page_scroll_on_new_message: PASS - window.scrollY remained 0 before and after sending a message
detailed_results.test_5_container_scrolls_to_bottom: PASS - Container at bottom after new message (scrollHeight=clientHeight=524, scrollTop=0)
detailed_results.test_7_answer_in_response: PASS - Answer content present in question response
detailed_results.test_10_news_imports: PASS - news.py loaded without import errors (all endpoints accessible)
detailed_results.test_11_notifications_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/notifications returns 200 with list structure
